## Example Consent: Example SMART Consent

Profile: [SMART Consent](StructureDefinition-SmartConsent.md)

## Participants

* **Role**: Patient
  * **Details**: patient1
* **Role**: Party
  * **Details**: Org1
* **Role**: Manager
  * **Details**: Org1

This consent is made under the regulation some policy .

* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): permit
  * [Time Period](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): permit
  * [Time Period](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): * Period: 1964-01-01 --> 2016-01-01

  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): * Purpose: [ActReason: COC](http://terminology.hl7.org/7.2.0/CodeSystem-v3-ActReason.html#v3-ActReason-COC) (coordination of care)

* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

    "purpose" : [{

  }
